app.welcomeHint: Type a message below to start chatting with Pi, or select a session from the sidebar.

extensions.installFailedNote: This extension requires npm. Make sure npm is installed and available to Picot, then try again.
extensions.uninstallFailedNote: Picot could not remove this extension package. Check the error details, then try again.

errors.newSessionOnlyNative: New session is only supported with a native host.
errors.newSessionPathUnavailable: Failed to start new session: current workspace path is unavailable
errors.newSessionNavUnavailable: Failed to start new session: navigation is unavailable
errors.newChatOnlyNative: Project new chat is only supported with a native host.
errors.newChatPathUnavailable: Failed to start new chat: project path is unavailable
errors.newChatNavUnavailable: Failed to start new chat: navigation is unavailable
errors.openProjectOnlyNative: Open project is only supported with a native host.
errors.openProjectPathUnavailable: Failed to open project: project path is unavailable
errors.openFolderOnlyNative: Open folder is only supported with a native host.

onboarding.openProject: Open a project to start chatting.
onboarding.configureKey: Configure an API key or provider to start chatting.

sidebar.failedToLoadSessionsRuntime: Failed to load sessions. Pi runtime may be unavailable.
sidebar.deleteArchivedConfirmOne: Delete {count} archived session permanently? This cannot be undone.
sidebar.deleteArchivedConfirmMany: Delete {count} archived sessions permanently? This cannot be undone.

updater.lastCheckFailed: Last update check failed. Open settings to retry.
updater.latestStable: You're on the latest stable version.
updater.pleaseRestart: Please restart Picot to finish updating.
updater.devBuild: Dev build — updates are checked only in packaged releases.
updater.prereleaseBuild: Pre-release build ({version}) — auto-update is disabled for this build.
updater.autoUpdatesDesktopOnly: Auto-updates are only available in the desktop app.
updater.noManifest: No update manifest published yet. Either the latest GitHub release doesn't include `latest.json`, or it has no entry for this platform. See docs/AUTO_UPDATER.md.
updater.pubkeyError: Updater public key is missing or the bundle signature is invalid. See docs/AUTO_UPDATER.md.

bootstrap.title: Picot could not start
bootstrap.descriptionPost: runtime that ships with Picot failed to launch.
bootstrap.help: This usually means the installation is incomplete or corrupted. Reinstalling Picot normally fixes it. Click Retry startup after reinstalling or rebooting.
bootstrap.tauriUnavailable: Tauri runtime is unavailable in this window.

settings.title: Settings
settings.browseHelp: Discover extensions, skills, themes, and prompts from the Pi ecosystem. Install with one click.
settings.thinkingTitle: Thinking effort controls reasoning depth. Click to cycle.
settings.thinkingAriaLabel: Thinking effort: {level}. Click to cycle reasoning depth.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the interface language. System Default follows your operating system.

auth.helpPost: (chmod 600). Picot launched from Finder does not read shell environment variables, so set keys here for them to stick across launches.
